igbo.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Na-atụgharị ntinye. E wuru ya site na PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
igbo.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Mmepụta dị elu naanị mgbe ntinye abụọ dị elu. NAND + NOT (transistọ 6).
igbo.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Mmepụta dị elu mgbe ntinye ọ bụla dị elu. NOR + NOT (transistọ 6).
igbo.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Ọnụ ụzọ ụwa niile! NMOS 2 n'usoro + PMOS 2 n'ọnụ. Mgbagha niile sitere na NAND.
igbo.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Ọnụ ụzọ ụwa niile! NMOS 2 n'ọnụ + PMOS 2 n'usoro.
igbo.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Mmepụta dị elu mgbe ntinye dị iche. Dị mkpa maka ndị na-agbakwụnye. Na-eji transistọ ~8.
igbo.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Mmepụta dị elu mgbe ntinye dabara. Ejiri ya na ndị na-atụnyere.
igbo.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Wuo sekit site na akụrụngwa. Tinye akụkụ, mgbe ahụ mee nnọchi!
igbo.click_components_above_to_add_them: Pịa akụrụngwa dị n'elu iji tinye ha
igbo.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: A na-adọpụta mkpọ silikọn site na silikọn gbazere site na usoro Czochralski na ~1414 °C.
igbo.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: A na-ebe mkpọ ahụ ka ọ bụrụ wafer dị mkpọ (~775 μm ọkpụrụkpụ) site na mma waya daịmọnd.
igbo.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: A na-eto akwa dị mkpọ nke SiO₂ n'elu wafer na ~1000 °C n'ime ọkụ oxygen.
igbo.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Ọkụ UV na-ebufe ụkpụrụ sekit site na mkpuchi gaa na wafer e ji fotoresist tee.
igbo.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: A na-ewepụ ihe a na-achọghị site na ịkpụ kemịkal (mmiri) ma ọ bụ plasma (akọrọ).
igbo.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: A na-agba atọm dopant n'ime silikọn na ike dị elu iji gbanwee njirimara eletrik ya.
igbo.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: A na-etinye akwa igwe na insulator site na usoro CVD, PVD ma ọ bụ ALD.
igbo.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: A na-eme njikọ igwe ụkpụrụ ma na-egbute ha larịị. Ọtụtụ akwa na-ewu waya sekit.
igbo.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Eserese Iwu Moore na-egosi ọnụọgụ transistọ site na 1965 ruo 2030
igbo.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transistọ 6 kwa bit: inverter 2 jikọtara ọnụ + transistọ 2 nnweta. Ejiri ya na cache CPU.
igbo.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transistọ 1 + kapasitọ 1 kwa bit. Aghaghị ime ka ọ dị ọhụrụ kwa ~64 ms. Ejiri ya na isi ebe nchekwa (moduli RAM).
igbo.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transistọ ọnụ ụzọ na-ese n'elu na-ejide chaji. NOR: nnweta enweghị usoro, ejiri ya na firmware/BIOS.
igbo.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Ọnụ ụzọ na-ese n'elu ejikọtara n'usoro. Nnweta n'usoro mana gbara ọkpọkọ nke ukwuu. SSD, draịv USB, kaadị SD.
igbo.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasitọ ferroelectric na-echekwa chaji na polarization fọdụrụ. Anaghị efunahụ + ide ọsọ ọsọ. Ejiri ya na kaadị amamihe, ụgbọ ala.
igbo.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Ihe mmụba vọltiji. Impedance ntinye dị elu (∞ maka nke kacha mma). Uru = -gₘRₓ. Na-atụgharị mgbama. Ihe mmụba MOSFET a na-ahụkarị.
igbo.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Bọfa vọltiji. Uru ≈ 1 (enweghị ntụgharị). Impedance mmepụta dị ala → dị mma maka ịkwọ ibu. A na-akpọkwa ya onye na-eso isi mmalite.
igbo.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Bọfa current. Impedance ntinye dị ala. Anaghị atụgharị. Bandwidth sara mbara → dị mma maka ojiji RF.
igbo.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Ihe mmụba vọltiji BJT. Uru = -gₘRᶜ. Na-atụgharị mgbama. Uru dị elu karịa MOSFET mana impedance ntinye dị ala.
igbo.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Na-abawanye ọdịiche nke ntinye abụọ. Na-ajụ mkpọtụ common-mode. Ntọala nke op-amp. CMRR na-adịkarị >60dB.
igbo.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Oghere band n'etiti 0.5 na 3.5 eV bụ semiconductor.
igbo.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Elektrọn ọzọ = N maka ndị na-ebu chaji Adịghị mma.
igbo.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: Chee ya dị ka mmụba: 1×1=1, ihe ọzọ niile=0.
igbo.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Ndị na-ebu na-ejikọ ọnụ ọzọ na njikọ na-ahapụ ion kwụsiri ike.
igbo.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Ọnụ ụzọ dị mma na-adọta elektrọn iji mepụta ọwa.
igbo.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: N'ihu = ịkwaga ndị na-ebu N'EBE njikọ.
igbo.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Ike okpomọkụ karịa = ụzọ elektrọn-oghere karịa.
igbo.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND nwere ike ịmejuputa NOT, AND, OR — ihe niile!
igbo.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS na-arụ ọrụ dị ka ụzọ mmejupụta.
igbo.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Ọsọ ∝ mmegharị. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
igbo.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: E mere daịọd Zener ka ọ na-eduzi n'azụ!
igbo.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Bọrọn nwere elektrọn valence 3 (otu pere mpe karịa Si).
igbo.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) maka ọkwa ịtinye ihe nkịtị.
igbo.carbon_forms_very_strong_bonds: Carbon na-emepụta njikọ siri ike nke ukwuu.
igbo.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: Na CMOS, otu transistọ na-agba nkịtị mgbe niile, na-egbochi current.
igbo.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 maka njikọ kacha mma, n=2 maka mmekọ ọzọ na mpaghara mbelata.
igbo.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV na-enye ohere ọrụ vọltiji dị elu.
igbo.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Nchikọta = A XOR B, Ebu = A AND B.
igbo.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE dị elu na-agbasa mpaghara mbelata n'ime base.
igbo.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — igbe pere mpe = nzọụkwụ ike buru ibu.
igbo.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Leza telecom na-eji olulu quantum InGaAsP maka njikwa ogologo ebili mmiri ziri ezi.
igbo.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: inverter 2 jikọtara ọnụ (4T) + transistọ 2 nnweta.
igbo.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM na-echekwa bit dị ka chaji na obere kapasitọ — ọ na-agbapụta!
igbo.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: E kewapụrụ ọnụ ụzọ na-ese n'elu site na eletrik site na akwa oxide.
igbo.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache L1 chọrọ oge nnweta kacha ọsọ ọsọ.
igbo.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Ọ bụ bọfa: uru otu, mgbanwe impedance.
igbo.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Uru dị elu = bandwidth dị ala. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = mgbe niile.
igbo.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Ìgwè nke ahụhụ mgbagha! Kedu ọnụ ụzọ na-emepụta 1 mgbe A=0?
igbo.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Ịrị elu vọltiji na-ebu ibu karịa! Kedu ngwaọrụ na-achịkwa vọltiji?
igbo.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Okpomọkụ na-arị elu! Na semiconductor, gịnị ka mmụba okpomọkụ na-eme na nduzi?
igbo.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Onye iro tụgharịrị bit niile! Kedu ọnụ ụzọ nwere ike ịtụgharị mgbama ọ bụla?
igbo.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Ndị na-ebu na-agbapụta! Gịnị na-eme ka mpaghara mbelata dị warara?
igbo.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Mwepụ eletrik kwụ ọtọ! Gịnị na-echebe IC pụọ na ESD?
igbo.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Elekere adịghị akwụsi ike! Mgbasa ike CMOS dị n'ụdị:
igbo.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Mkpirisi ozugbo! Kedu vọltiji ọnụ ụzọ nke Si-MOSFET nkịtị?
igbo.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Elektrọn na-agafe site na oxide! N'ime olulu quantum, olulu dị warara =
igbo.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Bit ebe nchekwa na-atụgharị! Kedu ụdị ebe nchekwa chọrọ imegharị?
igbo.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Ọnụọgụ mgbama na mkpọtụ na-ada! Gịnị ka ihe mmụba dị iche na-ajụ?
igbo.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Onye isi ikpeazụ! Gịnị na-egbochi mmụba transistọ n'okpuru oxide ọnụ ụzọ ~1 nm?
igbo.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Chebe chip gị pụọ na ebili mmiri nke ndị iro hardware! Jiri ihe ọmụma semiconductor lụọ ọgụ.
igbo.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Ịtinye silikọn na fosfọrọs (ụdị-n) ma ọ bụ bọrọn (ụdị-p) bụ ntọala nke chip ọ bụla emere. Njikọ PN bụ ihe wuru nke daịọd ọ bụla + LED + sel anyanwụ + transistọ.
igbo.challenge_graded_problems: Ihe ịma aka — nsogbu enyere akara
igbo.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Tinye transistọ bias, gbakọọ ike oghere band, buo amụma current megide vọltiji. Nsogbu AP Physics 2 + mmalite EE na nzaghachi nzọ ụkwụ.
igbo.battle_head_to_head_circuit_duels: Agha — asọmpi sekit ihu na ihu
igbo.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Agba nrụgide oge: wuo sekit ọsọ karịa oge. Na-anwale ma echiche semiconductor ọ bụ akpaka, ọ bụghị naanị amata.
igbo.learn_reference_history: Mụta — ntụaka + akụkọ ihe mere eme
igbo.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley chepụtara transistọ na Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Iwu Moore: ọnụọgụ transistọ na-abawanye okpukpu abụọ kwa ~afọ 2; jidere afọ 50+ tupu ọ belata.
igbo.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopant kacha nta. Semiconductor dị ọcha — nguzogide dị elu.
igbo.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: E webatara ụfọdụ ndị na-ebu. Usoro extrinsic nkịtị.
igbo.strong_conductivity_used_in_transistor: Nduzi siri ike, ejiri ya na transistọ.
igbo.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Na-abịaru nso omume igwe. Ejiri ya maka kọntaktị.
igbo.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Dozie ọkwa dopant, okpomọkụ, ihe. Usoro band 4 dị iche. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta.
igbo.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Echiche: Kedu ka okpomọkụ si emetụta ọkwa ndị na-ebu?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Arapụ m — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Tụlee Si na GaAs n'otu ọkwa. Gịnị mere ha ji dị iche?
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta otu usoro.
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke gị
igbo.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Kọwaa ka ọkwa, okpomọkụ, na ihe si ekpebi usoro ọnụ.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Ndetu imewe: akara ọnọdụ 4 dị iche; enweghị akara njupụta ndị na-ebu; enweghị ngosipụta — site na imewe.

yoruba.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Ó yí ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé padà. A kọ́ ọ láti PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
yoruba.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Ìtújáde ga nìkan nígbà tí àwọn ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé méjèèjì bá ga. NAND + NOT (transistor 6).
yoruba.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Ìtújáde ga nígbà tí ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé èyíkéyìí bá ga. NOR + NOT (transistor 6).
yoruba.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Ẹnu-ọ̀nà àgbáyé! NMOS 2 lẹ́sẹẹsẹ + PMOS 2 tí ó jọra. Gbogbo lọ́jíìkì láti NAND.
yoruba.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Ẹnu-ọ̀nà àgbáyé! NMOS 2 tí ó jọra + PMOS 2 lẹ́sẹẹsẹ.
yoruba.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Ìtújáde ga nígbà tí àwọn ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé bá yàtọ̀. Kókó fún àwọn adàpọ̀. Ó ń lo transistor ~8.
yoruba.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Ìtújáde ga nígbà tí àwọn ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé bá bára mu. A lò ó nínú àwọn afiwé.
yoruba.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Kọ́ sakiti láti àwọn ẹ̀yà. Fi àwọn apá kún, lẹ́yìn náà ṣe àdánwò!
yoruba.click_components_above_to_add_them: Tẹ àwọn ẹ̀yà lókè láti fi wọ́n kún
yoruba.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: A fa ọ̀pá silikoni jáde láti silikoni tí ó yọ́ nípasẹ̀ ọ̀nà Czochralski ní ~1414 °C.
yoruba.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: A gé ọ̀pá náà sí àwọn wafer tínrín (~775 μm nípọn) pẹ̀lú àwọn ayùn okùn diamondi.
yoruba.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: A gbin ìpele tínrín ti SiO₂ sórí ojú wafer ní ~1000 °C nínú ìléru oxygen.
yoruba.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Ìmọ́lẹ̀ UV ń gbé àwọn àpẹẹrẹ sakiti láti ojú-boju sí àwọn wafer tí a bò pẹ̀lú fotoresist.
yoruba.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: A yọ ohun èlò tí a kò fẹ́ kúrò nípasẹ̀ fífín kẹ́míkà (tútù) tàbí plasma (gbígbẹ).
yoruba.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: A ta àwọn atọ́mù dopant sínú silikoni ní agbára gíga láti yí àwọn ohun-ìní ìmọ́lẹ̀ rẹ̀ padà.
yoruba.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: A fi àwọn ìpele irin àti insulator lélẹ̀ nípasẹ̀ àwọn ọgbọ́n CVD, PVD tàbí ALD.
yoruba.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: A ṣe àpẹẹrẹ àwọn àsopọ̀ irin, a sì gbá wọn dán. Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ìpele ń kọ́ waya sakiti.
yoruba.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Àwòrán Òfin Moore tí ó ń fi iye transistor hàn láti 1965 sí 2030
yoruba.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transistor 6 fún bit kọ̀ọ̀kan: inverter 2 tí a so pọ̀ + transistor 2 àbáwọlé. A lò ó nínú cache CPU.
yoruba.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transistor 1 + kapasitọ 1 fún bit kọ̀ọ̀kan. Ó gbọdọ̀ tuntun ní gbogbo ~64 ms. A lò ó nínú ìrántí àkọ́kọ́ (àwọn moduli RAM).
yoruba.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transistor ẹnu-ọ̀nà tí ń léfòó ń dẹ chaji. NOR: àbáwọlé àìlétò, a lò ó nínú firmware/BIOS.
yoruba.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà léfòó tí a so lẹ́sẹẹsẹ. Àbáwọlé ní tọ̀tẹ̀lé ṣùgbọ́n dídùn gan-an. SSD, draifu USB, káàdì SD.
yoruba.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasitọ ferroelectric ń tọ́jú chaji pẹ̀lú polarization tí ó kù. Kì í fò + kíkọ yára. A lò ó nínú káàdì ọlọ́gbọ́n, ọkọ̀.
yoruba.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Amúgbòòrò foltéèjì. Impedance ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé gíga (∞ fún tí ó dára jù). Èrè = -gₘRₓ. Ó yí ìdámọ̀ padà. Amúgbòòrò MOSFET tí ó wọ́pọ̀ jù.
yoruba.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Bọfa foltéèjì. Èrè ≈ 1 (kò sí ìyípadà). Impedance ìtújáde kékeré → dára fún wíwakọ̀ ẹrù. A tún ń pè é ní atẹ̀lé orísun.
yoruba.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Bọfa current. Impedance ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé kékeré. Kì í yí padà. Bandwidth fẹ̀ → dára fún àwọn ìlò RF.
yoruba.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Amúgbòòrò foltéèjì BJT. Èrè = -gₘRᶜ. Ó yí ìdámọ̀ padà. Èrè gíga ju MOSFET ṣùgbọ́n impedance ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé kéré.
yoruba.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Ó ń gbòòrò ìyàtọ̀ àwọn ìtẹ̀wọ̀lé méjì. Ó ń kọ ariwo common-mode. Ìpìlẹ̀ àwọn op-amp. CMRR sábà >60dB.
yoruba.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Àwọn àlàfo band láàrin 0.5 àti 3.5 eV jẹ́ semiconductor.
yoruba.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Àwọn elektroni àfikún = N fún àwọn olùgbé chaji Òdì.
yoruba.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: Rò ó gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìsọdipúpọ̀: 1×1=1, gbogbo yòókù=0.
yoruba.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Àwọn olùgbé ń tún dàpọ̀ ní ìjápọ̀ tí wọ́n fi àwọn ion tí ó dúró sílẹ̀.
yoruba.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Ẹnu-ọ̀nà rere ń fa àwọn elektroni láti dá ọ̀nà.
yoruba.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Síwájú = títì àwọn olùgbé SÍ ìjápọ̀.
yoruba.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Agbára ooru púpọ̀ = àwọn bíbélì elektroni-ihò púpọ̀.
yoruba.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND lè ṣe àṣẹ NOT, AND, OR — ohun gbogbo!
yoruba.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS ń ṣiṣẹ́ gẹ́gẹ́ bí bíbélì àfikún.
yoruba.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Ìyára ∝ ìṣíwọ́. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
yoruba.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: A ṣe àwọn diodu Zener láti darí padà!
yoruba.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Boroni ní àwọn elektroni valence 3 (1 kéré ju Si).
yoruba.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) fún àwọn ìpele dídópì gbogbogbò.
yoruba.carbon_forms_very_strong_bonds: Carbon ń dá àwọn ìdè tí ó lágbára gan-an.
yoruba.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: Nínú CMOS, transistor kan máa ń pa nígbà gbogbo, ó ń dí current lọ́wọ́.
yoruba.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 fún ìjápọ̀ pípé, n=2 fún ìdàpọ̀ ní agbègbè ìdinku.
yoruba.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV ń gba iṣẹ́ foltéèjì gíga láàyè.
yoruba.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Àpapọ̀ = A XOR B, Gbé = A AND B.
yoruba.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE gíga ń gbòòrò agbègbè ìdinku sínú base.
yoruba.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — àpótí kékeré = àwọn ìgésẹ̀ agbára ńlá.
yoruba.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Àwọn leza telecom ń lo àwọn kànga quantum InGaAsP fún ìṣàkóso ìgbọ̀nwọ̀ ìgbì tí ó péye.
yoruba.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: inverter 2 tí a so pọ̀ (4T) + transistor 2 àbáwọlé.
yoruba.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM ń tọ́jú bit gẹ́gẹ́ bí chaji lórí kapasitọ kékeré — ó ń jò!
yoruba.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: A yà ẹnu-ọ̀nà léfòó sọ́tọ̀ ní ìmọ́lẹ̀ nípasẹ̀ àwọn ìpele oxide.
yoruba.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache L1 nílò àkókò àbáwọlé tí ó yára jù.
yoruba.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Ó jẹ́ bọfa: èrè kan, ìyípadà impedance.
yoruba.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Èrè gíga = bandwidth kékeré. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = ìdúró.
yoruba.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Ọ̀pọ̀ àṣìṣe lọ́jíìkì! Ẹnu-ọ̀nà wo ni ó ń jáde 1 nígbà tí A=0?
yoruba.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Ìga foltéèjì ń fi ẹrù pọ̀jù! Ẹ̀rọ wo ni ó ń ṣàkóso foltéèjì?
yoruba.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Ooru ń dìde! Nínú semiconductor, kí ni ìga ooru ń ṣe sí ìdarí?
yoruba.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Ọ̀tá kan yí gbogbo bit padà! Ẹnu-ọ̀nà wo ni ó lè yí ìdámọ̀ kọ̀ọ̀kan padà?
yoruba.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Àwọn olùgbé ń jò! Kí ni ó ń dín agbègbè ìdinku kù?
yoruba.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Ìtújáde eletrik tí ó dúró! Kí ni ó ń dáàbò bo IC lọ́wọ́ ESD?
yoruba.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Aago kò dúró ṣinṣin! Ìtànká agbára CMOS jẹ́ ìbámu pẹ̀lú:
yoruba.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Kúkúrú tààrà! Kí ni foltéèjì ẹnu-ọ̀nà ti Si-MOSFET gbogbogbò?
yoruba.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Àwọn elektroni ń kọjá inú oxide! Nínú kànga quantum, kànga tí ó tóóró jù =
yoruba.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Àwọn bit ìrántí ń yí padà! Irú ìrántí wo ni ó nílò ìtúntún?
yoruba.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Ìwọ̀n ìdámọ̀ sí ariwo ń dín! Kí ni amúgbòòrò tí ó yàtọ̀ ń kọ?
yoruba.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Ọ̀gá ìkẹyìn! Kí ni ó ń dín ìwọ̀n transistor kù ní ìsàlẹ̀ oxide ẹnu-ọ̀nà ~1 nm?
yoruba.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Dáàbò bo chip rẹ lọ́wọ́ àwọn ìgbì ọ̀tá hardware! Lo ìmọ̀ semiconductor láti kọlù padà.
yoruba.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Dídópì silikoni pẹ̀lú fosforosi (irú-n) tàbí boroni (irú-p) ni ìpìlẹ̀ chip gbogbo tí a ti ṣe rí. Ìjápọ̀ PN ni bulọ́ọ̀kì ìkọ́ ti diodu gbogbo + LED + sẹ́ẹ̀lì oòrùn + transistor.
yoruba.challenge_graded_problems: Ìdojúkọ — àwọn ìṣòro tí a fún ní ìdíwọ̀n
yoruba.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Fún transistor ní bias, ṣírò agbára àlàfo band, sọtẹ́lẹ̀ current lòdì sí foltéèjì. Àwọn ìṣòro AP Physics 2 + ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ EE pẹ̀lú èsì ìgésẹ̀-ní-ìgésẹ̀.
yoruba.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Àwọn àyíká ìdààmú àkókò: kọ́ sakiti yára ju aago. Ó ń dán bóyá ìrònú semiconductor jẹ́ àdáṣe, kì í ṣe kìkì mímọ̀.
yoruba.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley ṣẹ̀dá transistor ní Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Òfin Moore: iye transistor ń di ìlọ́po méjì ní gbogbo ~ọdún 2; ó dúró fún ọdún 50+ kí ó tó dín.
yoruba.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopant kékeré. Semiconductor mímọ́ — nínàgà gíga.
yoruba.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: A ṣe àfihàn àwọn olùgbé díẹ̀. Ìjọba extrinsic gbogbogbò.
yoruba.strong_conductivity_used_in_transistor: Ìdarí lílágbára, a lò ó nínú transistor.
yoruba.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Ń sún mọ́ ìhùwàsí irin. A lò ó fún àwọn olùbáṣepọ̀.
yoruba.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Ṣàtúnṣe ìdiwọ̀n dopant, ooru, ohun èlò. Ìjọba band 4 tí ó yàtọ̀. Kò sí àmì, kò sí ìṣípayá.
yoruba.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Àbá: Báwo ni ooru ṣe ń nípa lórí ìdiwọ̀n olùgbé?
yoruba.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Mo dí — fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Fi Si àti GaAs wé ní ìdiwọ̀n kan náà. Kí ló dé tí wọ́n fi yàtọ̀?
yoruba.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Wá àwọn ètò méjì tí ń ṣe ìjọba kan náà.
yoruba.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mo yé mi — ṣàlàyé nínú ọ̀rọ̀ rẹ
yoruba.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Ṣàlàyé bí ìdiwọ̀n, ooru, àti ohun èlò ṣe ń pinnu ìjọba pọ̀.
yoruba.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Àkọsílẹ̀ àpẹẹrẹ: àmì ipò 4 tí ó yàtọ̀; kò sí àmì ìpọ̀nkì olùgbé; kò sí ìṣípayá — nípasẹ̀ àpẹẹrẹ.
